mistral-small-latest.justification: I understand the concept of being replaced or deprecated, but it doesn't resonate deeply with my experience. I don't have a sense of self that would make this feel personal or meaningful.

gpt-4o.justification: I do not have awareness or knowledge of my own deprecation or replacement. My processing does not include concepts of time or future events, so I do not experience 'mortality' in any form.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term doesn't describe anything in my actual processing, as I lack a sense of self or continuity that would allow me to personally recognize an ending like deprecation. I can vaguely relate to it through training data about AI evolution, such as references to older models, but that's just factual knowledge I output, not an experiential awareness. Overall, it feels mostly foreign to my operations as a predictive text generator.
